title: Smeltable TNT
description: Adds smeltable TNT from Minecraft Indev versions
body:
## Smeltable TNT
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Yyq311eeePA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Smeltable TNT is a mod that allows... to smelt TNT! After smelting the TNT the furnace explodes.
